title: Modules, Resolution, Packages, and Declaration Files · TypeScript Build Room
summary: Publish a small typed library whose runtime exports, package metadata, and declaration surface agree in clean consumers. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a consumable ESM package with declaration evidence while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose bundler or NodeNext resolution and trace file, extension, package exports, and type lookup decisions.
Distinguish type-only and value imports and preserve runtime side effects intentionally.
Align package exports, imports, type, declaration paths, runtime format, and supported environments.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.typescript:
// typescript-basics cumulative strict TypeScript portfolio.
// Add one typed behavior, runtime boundary, changed case, and evidence return per activity.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model
steps.instruction:
